description: Eval set for classify_concept (Phase 1 deliverable). Expected types are drawn from the master prompt's own examples plus boundary-discipline cases. Run with: npm run eval:classifier (requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, GOOGLE_API_KEY, or OPENAI_API_KEY).

cases.concept: Identifying whether a line is horizontal
Recognizing the letter 'b'
Identifying the thesis statement in an essay
Identifying whether a word problem is a multiplication problem vs an addition problem
Identifying whether an object is a vehicle
Recognizing whether a group of words is a complete sentence
Judging which of two slopes is steeper
Determining whether it got warmer or colder from thermometer readings
Long division
Multiplying fractions
Calculating WACC (weighted average cost of capital)
Structuring a five-paragraph essay
Subject-verb agreement: when the subject is singular the verb takes -s
Acids turn litmus paper red
When cash flows are unstable, DCF valuation confidence drops
Choosing the right valuation approach for an acquisition
Diagnosing why a team is underperforming
Formulating a market-entry strategy
Ethical judgment about a layoff decision in context
Negotiating a vendor contract renewal
